title: Recruitment Consultant
description:
About Quess Singapore

Quess Singapore is part of Quess Corp, one of Asia’s leading business services providers. We specialize in workforce solutions that help our clients streamline operations, scale teams efficiently, and access top talent across industries. Our mission is to connect exceptional people with the right opportunities while building lasting relationships with both candidates and clients.

Role Overview

As a Recruitment Consultant at Quess Singapore, you will be responsible for supporting the end-to-end recruitment process for assigned clients. This role is ideal for someone passionate about talent acquisition, building relationships, and delivering an excellent candidate experience. You will work closely with senior consultants and managers to source, screen, and match top talent with client requirements.

Key Responsibilities

1. Talent Sourcing & Screening

  • Source candidates using job boards, LinkedIn, social media, referrals, and internal databases.
  • Screen and shortlist candidates based on job descriptions and client requirements.
  • Conduct initial interviews and assessments to evaluate candidate fit.

2. Recruitment Delivery

  • Coordinate interviews between candidates and clients, managing scheduling and feedback loops.
  • Support the offer process, including salary negotiation and reference checks.
  • Maintain candidate pipelines for active and future roles.

3. Client & Candidate Engagement

  • Ensure timely updates and communication to candidates, providing a positive candidate experience.
  • Support the senior consultant/account manager in maintaining strong client relationships.
  • Share insights on candidate market trends with the team.


4. Administrative & Process Compliance

  • Keep accurate and updated records on the Applicant Tracking System (ATS).
  • Ensure all documentation and compliance requirements are met.
  • Generate basic recruitment reports for internal tracking.


Key Skills & Attributes

  • Passion for recruitment, talent management, and helping people find the right opportunities.
  • Strong communication, interpersonal, and organizational skills.
  • Ability to multitask and work under pressure to meet deadlines.
  • Proactive, detail-oriented, and a good team player


Qualifications & Experience

  • Bachelor’s Degree in Human Resources, Business, or related field (preferred).
  • 6 years of recruitment experience (agency or in-house) with a strong track record in meeting targets for contract and permanent placements
  • Familiarity with sourcing techniques (Boolean search, LinkedIn Recruiter) is an advantage.
  • Previous success in a 360-recruitment or full-desk role is highly preferred.
  • Demonstrated ability to develop new business and build strong client relationships.
  • Experience in IT recruitment is essential; exposure to non-IT sectors (e.g., Banking, Finance, Engineering, Healthcare, etc.) is a strong advantage.
  • Entrepreneurial, results-oriented mindset with the drive to operate independently and achieve targets.
  • Strong communication, negotiation, and stakeholder management skills.


Why Join Quess Singapore?

  • Great Place to Work® Certified: We’ve been certified two years in a row, reflecting our focus on a supportive and collaborative culture.
  • Learning & Development: Structured training and mentorship to help you grow as a recruitment professional.
  • Career Growth: Clear paths to progress into Senior Consultant and Account Management roles.
  • Exciting Client Portfolio: Opportunity to work with leading companies across various industries.
  • Team Environment: Join a high-energy, collaborative team where your contributions are valued.



Savita Rai
EA REG NO: R1873418
EA License No:23C2060


This is in partnership with the Employment and Employability Institute Pte Ltd (“e2i”).

e2i is the empowering network for workers and employers seeking employment and employability solutions. e2i serves as a bridge between workers and employers, connecting with workers to offer job security through job-matching, career guidance and skills upgrading services, and partnering employers to address their manpower needs through recruitment, training, and job redesign solutions. e2i is a tripartite initiative of the National Trades Union Congress set up to support nation-wide manpower and skills upgrading initiatives. By applying for this role, you consent to Quesscorp Singapore’s PDPA and e2i’s PDPA.

Disclaimer: The company is committed to ensuring the privacy and security of your information. By submitting this form, you consent to the collection, processing, and retention of the information you provide. The data collected (which may include your contact details, educational background, work experience and skills) will be used solely for the purpose of evaluating your qualifications for the position you're applying for. Your data will be stored securely and retained for the duration necessary to fulfill our hiring process. If you are not selected for the position, your data will be kept on file for a limited period in case future opportunities arise. You have the right to access, correct, or delete your data at any time by contacting us at Quess Singapore | A Leading Staffing Services Provider in Singapore (quesscorp.sg)
